title: Experimental Testing Ethical Assessment
body:
_____ Is the test Medically relevant?
_____ Would the experiment be considered ethically questionable outside a virtual testing environment?
_____ Do you consider the simulated entity to be “alive”?
_____ Did the simulated entity present visible symptoms of pain?
_____ On a scale of 1-10 how emotionally disturbing are the results of this experiment?
_____ Remember, this isn’t real. You may be experiencing Involuntary Suspension of Disbelief.
_____ It is recommended to return to a Conceptual Isolation Chamber as soon as possible.
_____ Does the lighting and/or ambient sounds in the environment change your perception of the ethical questionability of the experiment?

- Ethics Officer, A.A.
